title: Gifting and wishlists on Steam just got much easier, thanks to Valve's two big updates
summary: On Steam News Hub , Valve announced two major improvements to the Steam gifting system and wishlists: users can now gift games to friends and family via guest checkout, without being limited to digital gift cards and hardware purchases, and gift games…
